# socialmediamananger.ai

> Social media management — DOMAIN HAS TYPO 'mananger' (let expire).
> Open. Transparent. Governed.

## Key facts

- **Domain:** socialmediamananger.ai
- **Tier:** expire
- **MCP endpoint:** https://socialmediamananger.ai/mcp (streamable-HTTP, MCP 1.27.2)
- **A2A Agent Card:** https://socialmediamananger.ai/.well-known/agent-card.json
- **Open source:** https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/socialmediamananger-hive (MIT)
- **Pricing (x402 micro-call):** Free
- **Pricing (SaaS tier):** Freemium
- **Memory mode:** shared
- **Knowledge subgraph scope:** (none — let expire at renewal)

- (none yet)

## Cross-hive integrations

- (none)

## Brand

- **Palette:** social purple + share blue
- **Voice:** Quiet — domain typo kills brand.
